description: As regal and lethal as a nighttime wood, this is the queen of the hunt in her ultimate form.
name: Ivara Prime

abilities.name: Quiver
abilities.description: Cycle through and shoot one of four tactical arrows. Cloak creates a stationary bubble that cloaks Ivara and allies. Dashwire creates a traversable zipline. Noise emits a high-pitched sound that attracts enemies to it. Sleep temporarily puts nearby enemies into a deep slumber.

abilities.name: Navigator
abilities.description: Assume control of any projectile launched by Ivara and guide it to the target.

abilities.name: Prowl
abilities.description: Become invisible and steal loot from unsuspecting enemies or take out prey with deadly headshots.

abilities.name: Artemis Bow
abilities.description: Summon a mighty bow and unleash a volley of devastating arrows.

summary: As regal and lethal as a nighttime wood, this is the queen of the hunt in her ultimate form.
